markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 12
#### Article 50. Saving Clauses
##### § 3011 — Reference to highway law

The reference by any law, general or special, to any section of articles eleven or eleven-a of the highway law shall be deemed a reference to the corresponding section of the vehicle and traffic law as modified or changed by this chapter.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
